LoginPage.title: Welcome back
LoginPage.subtitle: Sign in to manage your AI Agents

UnauthorizedPage.title: Access Denied
UnauthorizedPage.subtitle: Authentication Required
UnauthorizedPage.description: You are trying to access a page that requires authorization. Please sign in with your account to continue.

AgentsPage.title: Your agents
AgentsPage.subtitle: Select an Agent to open chat, or create a new one
AgentsPage.noAgentsDesc: Start by creating your organization's first AI Agent

AgentManagePage.subtitle: Manage knowledge for this agent
AgentManagePage.knowledgeDesc: Select documents this agent can use for RAG retrieval. Changes take effect after saving.

NewAgentPage.title: Create a new agent
NewAgentPage.subtitle: Configure your AI Agent in {count} steps
NewAgentPage.toolsDesc: Enable external skills to allow Agent to retrieve data or calculate automatically
NewAgentPage.publishDesc: If disabled, only you and permitted users can see it
NewAgentPage.noModels: No models — go to Library → Models to add
NewAgentPage.noSkills: No skills registered. Go to Library > Tools to register.

ChatPage.inputPlaceholder: Send a message to the Agent…
ChatPage.shortcuts: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
ChatPage.intro: Ask me anything — let's see how I can help

DashboardPage.title: Usage
DashboardPage.subtitle: Usage overview and token cost breakdown
DashboardPage.searchPlaceholder: Search user by name or email...

KnowledgePage.title: Knowledge
KnowledgePage.subtitle: Upload documents to use as Agent's knowledge base (RAG)
KnowledgePage.dragPlaceholder: Drag file here or click to select
KnowledgePage.fileSupport: Supports PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD, CSV
KnowledgePage.bindInstructions: Select Agent first, then click 'Bind' on the document
KnowledgePage.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this document? This action cannot be undone.

ModelsPage.title: Models
ModelsPage.subtitle: Define AI models that Agents can use
ModelsPage.confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the model "{name}"? This action will remove the model from active selections.

ProvidersPage.title: Providers
ProvidersPage.subtitle: Manage connections to AI model providers
ProvidersPage.encryptedNote: 🔒 Encrypted with Fernet before storing in database
ProvidersPage.testInstruction: Must test connection successfully before adding
ProvidersPage.name: Name

ToolsPage.title: Tools & Skills
ToolsPage.subtitle: Manage integrations and system execution capabilities bound to your AI Agents
ToolsPage.name: Name
ToolsPage.noTools: No tools or skills registered yet.
ToolsPage.skillIntro: Define the integration settings and JSON parameters schema so LLMs can execute this skill automatically.
ToolsPage.descInstruction: Description (Instruction to help LLM decide when to run this)
ToolsPage.descInstructionPlaceholder: Retrieve remaining annual and sick leave balance for an employee using their email...
ToolsPage.endpointUrl: Endpoint URL (Use absolute URL, or relative /api/... for local endpoints)
ToolsPage.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? AI agents will no longer be able to run this integration.
ToolsPage.testIntro: Send parameters to evaluate raw execution output.

UsersPage.title: Users
UsersPage.subtitle: Manage users in the system
UsersPage.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {email}? This action cannot be undone.
